cards.back: A waterborne disease caused by Vibrio cholerae bacteria, leading to severe diarrhea and dehydration
A waterborne disease caused by parasitic flatworms, leading to liver and intestinal problems
A waterborne disease caused by Salmonella Typhi bacteria, leading to fever, headache, and abdominal pain
A water-induced disease caused by consumption of water contaminated with arsenic, leading to cancer, skin discoloration, and other health problems
A waterborne disease caused by bacteria such as Shigella or E. coli, leading to diarrhea, abdominal pain, and dehydration
